title: KawaMood's Waystones in Villages
description: Addon that generates KawaMood's Waystones in villages. This allows players to access fast travel points within villages.
body:
Addon that generates KawaMood's Waystones in villages. This allows players to access fast travel points within villages.

![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a40a78478794a35d4c05ecceefb11c6e13c8f1bf.png)

**You have to download [KawaMood's Waystones](https://modrinth.com/datapack/waystones-data-pack) for the datapack/mod to work!**

**If you're going to use it on a server, set "enable-command-block" to true in server.properties.**
![Support](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7e092852be35d06e6534b41420e324ecea64fa1b.png)
# Structures
**🏦 Waystones in Villages**

With this addon, now all vanilla Minecraft villages become travel points with Waystones! Each Waystone visually adapts to the unique style of the village where it is found. There's also a version for zombie villages.

This pack has two versions, each with its differences:
- In the datapack version, waystones are rarer, which solves issues like having more than one waystone in a village.
- The mod version is considered the best for gameplay; it guarantees that a waystone will always be generated in villages, and there are no issues with duplicates

**Future Plans**
- ~~Random names for the waystones~~
- Support for other Mods/Datapacks adding new villages ([Towns and Towers](https://modrinth.com/mod/towns-and-towers), [ChoiceTheorem's Overhauled Village](https://modrinth.com/mod/ct-overhaul-village), [~~Terralith~~](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), [Incendium](https://modrinth.com/mod/incendium), [~~Dungeons and Taverns~~](https://modrinth.com/datapack/dungeons-and-taverns), [~~The Creeper's Code~~](https://modrinth.com/datapack/the-creepers-code) and [~~Stellarity~~](https://modrinth.com/datapack/stellarity))
- ~~A remake of the structures (_I know I can do better... hopefully_)~~
